review_text:
Just spent a few relaxing nights at Windang Caravan Park. We stayed in a two bedroom cabin next to the lake. The cabin was spacious and clean with everything provided.
Only downside no wifi 🙁
Stayed for 2 nights recently in a 2 bedroom cabin.  Absolutely loved it.  So clean and spacious.  We've stayed in many tourist park cabins but this was definitely one of the best.

Stayed here in our caravan for a long weekend. The park and amenities are very clean. You have the lake on one side and the beach on the other, both a stones throw from the park, you can listen to the surf rolling in to put you to sleep!
Best time bike rides to Kiama, you can also do up to Wollongong or around the lake so much to see also kayaking all you have to do is watch the tides beach at door step sunset are beautiful here to

I stayed here over the school holidays with my 2 sons and its absolutely fantastic. From the location to the staff. The office staff are extremely helpful and so professional.

It is so cleaned and well maintained.
I have relocated to the Illawarra area and have extended my stay untill my new place is ready instead of staying elsewhere just because of how amazing this park is. It's got everything.

Do yourself a favour and book your next trip here.

So highly recommended.
Great location. Clean facilities and really helpful staff on reception
Excellent ❤️👍.Clean, comfortable and quiet. Highly recommended!

Stayed on a powered drive through site. Nice big flat sites with multiple water points and easy access to power. Amenities were clean and tidy. Perfect for fisho's. Direct access to the inlet and beach. Walking distance to the bowling club and pub.
Gorgeous place so close to the water
Great location and park
Very well set out campsites, plenty of amenities they were very clean and tidy. Friendly and helpful staff. Close to beach and river for water actives and Picnics etc.
No wifi and very weak mobile networks

Travelling Aussies 🇦🇺

We’ve just enjoyed a couple of very relaxing nights at this great caravan park 🏆

Located on the estuary waterfront with a surf beach out front.  Windang Bowls Club and local cafes + shops + post office all within an easy walk 👍

We found the area peaceful and quiet, even on a weekend

Park staff are lovely and went out of their way to ensure we were happy with our site

Park facilities and modern and spotlessly clean, with a lovely camp kitchen and children’s playground

This is a fantastic holiday location and reasonably priced.  Highly recommended ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Stayed at Windang Beach Tourist Park and found it to be a very solid option. Excellent location right near the beach, quiet at night, and well maintained. Facilities were clean and practical, and everything felt straightforward and well run. Heaps of good options to dine nearby.||No frills, just a comfortable, convenient base if you want easy access to the coast without hassle. Would stay again in the area.
Camped for last 4 years on ensuite site. Great facilities and location!
Been coming here for 35 years, from camping to staying in the cabins, this is always been home away from home.

You couldn't ask for a better location—nestled right between the calm waters of Lake Illawarra and the beach. It’s a paradise for anyone who loves fishing, paddleboarding, or just watching the sunrise over the ocean. The park is well-maintained, and having the lake on one side and the surf on the other makes it feel like a true escape.

Windang Beach tourist Holiday Park has been in existence since 1970's . Our parents took us there on holidays , as children!!

Such a beautiful, friendly, courtesy, respect & absolutely idicic .
The Park boarders the river and the Beach of Windang / Lake Illawarra & of course the river inlet & Boat Marina is located southern Warilla, flowing rapidly westward under the Windang Vehicle  Bridge , past the the bowling club and the old docks and The old Jettys directly opposite which once housed Tiels Boat Shed! Outboard boat hire ,fishing, tackle & bait.
Once past tiels boat shed , the always gorgeous waterway zigzags one kilometre to the west prior to opening into the magnificent expanse of LAKE ILLAWARRA!
The employees of the park are the real attractions!
Nothing is to hard, nothing is too much , and the  warmth and diligence of your welcome will be one of the awesome memories , You will hold with you for an age!! Or just until you return the following Year, and with due respect!! You will be counting the days until you can visit again on  your next unforgettable Holiday

Have been here a couple times now and thoroughly enjoyed the stay each time. The location is amazing and then staff are very friendly. The cabins are always clean and the park has everything you need. Highly recommended this location for a holiday!

I booked this thinking I’d be somewhere on the lake, however this “tourist” park looks like something out the 1990’s. It’s rows and rows of onsite cabins and caravans. The spot I was given was an en-suite site, so it had a separate toilet and shower which was great, except that I asked for the most private spot and was literally put out on the least private of the available ones. It felt like just a place to sleep, I booked two nights but only stayed one and would not be returning.
Close to beach and lake
I've stayed hear before and worth the stay walking distance to the beach and serviced toilet block for caravans and camping and good for a walk

We had a great stay! The view was lovely, the service was excellent, the accommodation was clean, and the bed was very comfortable. It was also in a great location with easy access to dinner spots, shops, and the beach. Highly recommend!”
Great place for holidays
Top spot. Great location, modern facilities

Two weeks stay in my own caravan had the best time. Lots of cabins in the park, even when booked out for the long weekend was a nice quiet relaxing stay. Camp view of the lake was  perfect and still private. First week with my granddaughter in the school holiday, beach every day and second week on my own relaxed and just chilling out reading books. Clean and well maintained amenities block. Fenced in security park felt very safe. Famous words “I’ll be back” 🙌🏻😊 thank you 🫶🏻☀️😎

Fantastic stay. We had a 2 bedroom cabin and it was perfect. Upon arrival the cabin smelled super fresh and clean. There was everything you need from kettle, microwave, stove top and cookware, cutlery and plenty of towels and linen.

Great location right on the lake and close walking distance to shops and restaurants. Loved our stay here. Thank you 😊 🙏

Fairly average council-run park. Not bad, not good, just average.
Location is good, backing on to the surf beach out the back and the lake out the front, walk to some shops including a small supermarket, and walk to the Club Windang.
But, our site was mostly dirt (there were a few with grass), next to a rundown permanent with an old fibro annex. Not pretty.
The amenities looked nice, but they also looked like they weren't cleaned well or often. One urinal in the mens was blocked (yuk!) and the hand paper ran out and wasn't replaced while we were there.
It could have been much better.
We stayed on one of the sites in our caravan. Fantastic view,  easy walk to the beach and cafe.
Perfect place for a camper I can never ask for more
Superb location next to lake and sea, great amenities and lovely reception staff.
One of our favourite places to stay. Big drive thru sites and clean amenities. Staff super friendly. Perfect location.
Good place to stay but needs wifi.
Nice clean place nestled between the lake and the ocean, but at $100 a night for a family of 4 well and truly off peak is overpriced for what you get.
Very lovely for family out

Although very clean, unfortunately I would describe our cabin accommodation as adequate and not particularly comfortable.||Lounge seating was spongey, |dining chairs were hard plastic, and all|beds were hard, making sleep difficult.|Storage was adequate. ||The shower floor was slippery when first used. Possibly cleaning solution not completely rinsed off. ||Thankfully, the kitchen was basically equipped for meal preparation. ||Air conditioning had previously been set on a timer, which proved frustrating with  time wasted when checking in on a cold afternoon. ||Tree roots growing above ground level in cabin parking area made parking especially difficult. ||
Beach front. In between the lake and the Ocean. Clean amenities.  Easy access to the beach. Will come again.
It's Holidays away from Home in Caravan

We stayed in the new deluxe 2 bedroom cabins for 4 nights. The cabin was really clean and modern with everything you needed and in a great location just across from the water. The check in process was also really easy and convenient. We had a great stay and definitely will be back.
You are close to the beach and the lake
A great location nestled between the beach and the lake, but sheltered from the wind, and within walking distance of shops. Clean amenities and grounds.
Big sites. Clean amenaties
这个时代怎么可以没有网络
Amazing place and so peaceful. Super satisfied. Qualità prezzo eccezionale.

4/2～4/3兩人 power site 一晚44
原本只住一晚 但是太棒了 乾淨的廁所和廚房
忍不住又加了一晚 離湖跟沙灘也很近
紧邻河边 安静舒适
After getting myself into a mischief i couldnt manage - Michelle and Viv pulled through and assisted in rectifying my error! Absolute A1 customer service. Love your work ladies! Thanks again!!!
It was great, nice and tidy cabin bbq area with seating across the road.
Great and beautiful location, quiet, close to key amenities.  Easy to access.
Great location, lovely staff. Was very comfortable.

Great location.
Clean and tidy.
2 bedroom cabins would be better suited with a fan in each room.
Advised staff on Friday of fan not working on heat lamp in bathroom.
Left Sunday and still not fixed.
Not good enough
Good place only issue to use the laundry you need 1 and 2 dollars coin , no card option
Walking distance to Bowling Club and Lake Illawarra Hotel.

We stayed in a tent on a powered ensuite site for two nights.
We were very happy with the facilities and amenities. We will definitely come back again. We will recommend to our friends.
We saw the exterior of the cabins and they looked newish and well maintained.

Well located between the river & sea.
Clean & Well operated

We stayed here for 2 nights on a powered site,  lovely park & very clean. On one side of the park you have the river and the other side you have the sea.  A short walk under the bridge to the bowls club for dinner, which was lovely.

Location was very nice. Welcoming staff members at the front. Good pricing too. Unfortunately, when going to bed was surprised to find hairs on the top of the flat sheet. As someone who prioritises hygiene and cleanliness, was very disappointed by this discovery.
Great fun
Great park, roomy sites, direct beach access and lake side on other side of park. Amenities very clean, will definitely return!

Windang Beach Tourist Park had great, clean, affordable family accommodation. The staff were truly amazing, always going the extra mile to help. Special thanks to Viv for going above and beyond! We really appreciate it and will definitely be back!
Kid-friendly.  Place is very clean <3

We disliked this resort so much that we cut our family holiday short and abandoned a night stay losing money. We booked a cabin over the phone for our family of four stating the children’s ages and one being a two month old infant. Upon arrival we realise there is no room or space for a portable cot meaning no where safe for our infant to sleep. We had no phone service inside the cabin. Being told you have to make your own beds but then having no space to even make the bed with everything being stuck to the wall. The wall in the main bedroom had dirty scuff marks all over it and the pillow were as hard as rock. Blankets were old and stiff and the room had a very musty smell to it overall one of the worst experiences of my life
Good location

I was really surprised to see our rooms so spacious and clean. Kitchen was fully equipped and living room was cozy with a couch and TV. Surrounding was quiet and you need specific codes to get in to the ground so I think it's safe as well. Only downfall is it's bit away from the town so if you want to eat out, you'll need to drive some distance. Otherwise highly recommend it. Great value.

Camping super sympa avec de bonnes prestations la plage est en accès direct depuis les emplacements.
Vue sur la rivière de l'autre côté

20 minutes south of the CBD, Windang Beach Tourist Park is a great place to stay, and it will take weeks to get sick of it. One side of the park is Lake Illawarra, with the other side being the beach.
Fantastic facility. Staff give exceptional service
We camped
Camped at this great little spot. Good access to the beach and amenities are clean tidy.
2 bed en-suite cabin, very tidy and clean, reasonably priced $159/night, great location, highly recommended. Loved the place.
We were camping here. Spacious place with access to both lake and Windang beach. Clean amenities.

Stayed three days in our camper,amenities were clean and comfortable, it's nice and close to the entrance to Lake Illawarra if you like to fish,security at the park is good and it's quiet except for the construction happening at present, we enjoyed the stay.
Great caravan park in a great location. Short walk to Club Windang which has excellent food.
We had a caravan ensuite site.

i love this spot it has many opportunities to fish and catch bait. The rooms are big and the staff are very friendly this brings a good opportunity to whoever wants to go vacation or a holiday. Overall this place is amazing and your children will have alot of fun here

This park reminded me of an English Holiday Park. Lots of cabins. My stay was wet and windy, but the welcome was warm and the kind help appreciated. Easy walk to an amazing bowls club for a delicious dinner.
Great place Central to our needs

Nice, clean well maintained Tourist Park in a good location, close to beach and lake and walking distance to town centre. Cabin was clean, comfortable, spacious and well appointed. Only downside - no wifi available in the park.  Recommended.

Stayed ten days, wife recovering from surgery, easy parking, wheelchair ramp thoughtful, easy access to shower, cabin miniature home comfy & roomy, price reasonable. Pleasant surroundings and the park also provided sunny weather !!. We will be back. Bob & Maree Bateup
Great for the kids plenty to do.
Stayed in a two bedroom cabin.  What a lovely place, great cabin (more like a small house) great location, staff are extremely helpful. Will definitely be back.
Everything you expect a tourist caravan park to be and in a great location for the beach, the boat ramp, and for getting into town. Great walk around the channel. Would definitely stay again.

The place was in good,  clean conditions with reasonable price.  It  is conveniently locate right next to windang beach and recreation areas.
Free Wifi availability is something could and  should be be included will make the place a greater attraction.
Camped. Great site. Toilets/bathrooms very clean. Location great. Camp kitchen clean and had everything we could need.
Staff were friendly and helpful. Caravan sites were very user friendly. Happy to go there again.
Great location by the lake, friendly service and nice clean accommodation.
Good amenities, helpful staff and lots of room were great but the best thing about the park is the location. Right on the river and the beach, it was glorious.
This is the second time here. We use it for a base to visit our family. Great park. Clean amenities and excellent value

Stayed in an ensuite site for 3 nights. Great location, massive camp kitchen, big site , ammenities were very clean , the whole property was well maintained. I would highly recommend this park, it’s not overpriced like the other parks either . Beach on one side lake on the other, perfect spot.
Location was great, away from the highway and 200m from the beach.

Stayed there on a powered site in my tent for a couple of nights while travelling the Eastern States. It is one of the best caravan parks i have ever stayed at - its so professionally done, very modern, wonderfully secure (security codes for everything) and the location is sensational. I wish i allowed for more time there!
Lovely place for a relaxing day.
Hi public i enjoyed doing my fishing 🦦🎣 at Windang Beach Tourist Park and i love the place

We camped & have done quite a few times here now. The park is always clean, the facilities are always maintained and the staff are always helpful and courteous. Proximity to the beach and lake is an easy walk. Easy to book and the prices are reasonable.

Great place for a family getaway.
Lots to do like fishing, swimming and visiting the beautiful waterfalls near by

This place has exceeded our expectations regarding cleanliness and convenience. We booked the 3 room cabin and were very excited to spend 5 days during the school break.
Kitchen was fully equipped, laundry and dryer and iron all needed stuff were provided.
The location is just fabulous , Windang beach on one side and Illawarra lake on the other. The beach was a skip and a hop from our cabin. Staff were very friendly and helpful, cleaners were very professional. All of us the kids and adults have enjoyed our stay at Windang holiday park. We'll definitely go again soon!
Great place
Es un lugar muy hermoso

As a council owned park it needs attention. Grass needed mowing, whipper snipping and poisoning. It has a security fence but not on the beachside! Sites are large is a bonus but the ‘guests’ in the annual onsites were inconsiderate and a problem. Great location although it was windy a lot! Very pretty area and Shellharbour is friendly and had everything one could need in the way of shops and services.
This place would of been awesome if they allowed pets. Dog beach up the road……..
Great location and service. Cabin was good too. We went family with kids. Great spot and definitely recommended.
Great location, boat ramp in the adjacent carpark with access to Lake Illawarra and/or the ocean. Fishing is pretty good in the lake
Ensuite powered sites are very good. Great location.  It's a shame there are fences around the whole site but I guess it stops little kids from wandering to the lake or the beach.
Great location & good sites
Great value for a short trip to the Illawarra.. we stayed in cabins .
Beautiful place family friendly! You need to book in advance if you want a spot in the cabins especially during busy periods.
Excellent location. Great camp kitchen and clean amenities. Really lovely spot for all ages, especially good spot for fishing!
Wonderful place with views on both sides.  Clean and spacious cabin.

Site: we had a drive through site and it was large and reasonably well kept.

Staff: were fantastic through the two weeks.

Location: 15 mins to Wollongong, 20 mins to Kiama and everything in between. It’s a great middle ground.

It’s also on the river which is stunning and perfect for swimming. It was also within riding distance of 5 parks. Great for our 2 and 4 year old.

Showers: these were ok. Sometimes temperature capped. Other times not.

The amenities are clean. However had a bad experience with fishing rods stolen Saturday night whilst asleep in the caravan. Reported it and they said that it had happened before and security are aware.

Loved the location, the tourist park was nice but pity you can’t pick your neighbors. We were on the camping ground and unfortunately the neighbor that was next to the camping ground was absolutely awful. Yes that’s right cabin 305 … not only were they yelling and swearing so loud that the whole park could hear them that they decided that flicking the cigarette butts onto the camping ground was there dumping ground. Do I want to go back - hell no! Pity it’s affected the outcome of our stay over the long weekend. This is meant to be a family park but when you hear the amount of “c” & “f” words being used in every sentence it becomes a bit of a joke. Our children were mortified.
What topped it off was when they lit up a cigarette every few minutes they would flick the butt while it’s still smoking into the camping ground which was near our tent.
The only other issue I had was the charcoal bbqs people decided to light up near the camping grounds when it was a high wind area - common sense failed these people . Surrounded by bush and and you have morons lighting charcoal bbqs which will easily start a fire or burn down our tents. Other than that great park!

Booked accommodation three months in advance rang two weeks before arrival to pay found out they they cancelled it with out even contacting me gave it to someone else at a higher rate more than likely. said theres nothing we can do we have nothing for you.

Perfect spot surrounded by water and beautiful scenery.  Spacious rooms, fully contained cabins. All gates are pin locked. Kids friendly play area right outside. Good fishing spot and beach within walking distance.  Close to shops and restaurants.  All perfect.

Fantastic caravan park with excellent amenities.
Large sites for caravan, allowing awnings to be out, with your car parked alongside your caravan.
Close to local shops and major shopping centre.
Will return again.
Such a beautiful place will be going back every couple of months

Spacious layout - a nice amount of space for each caravan site.
Clean facilities: 2 amenities blocks, laundry and a great camp kitchen (BYO utensils, pots etc) with kettle, toaster, microwave, fridge & gas cooktop. (I can’t remember if there was an oven)
Outdoor covered seating and BBQ area next to kitchen.
Right next to the beach. Waves on the ocean side, calm fishing waters on the bridge side. Pelicans and seals as well as cormorants, ibises and seagulls when I was there (June)
Very friendly staff.

Very clean well maintained lovely park really looking forward to spending New Year's stay down there good fishing and swimming for the whole family lake at one side beach ⛱ at the other side beautiful place
We had a big family get together here and it was a fantastic place to stay clean an family friendly parks for kids also great club windang short walk away

Beautiful spot for the family to holiday! Weather wasn't great but we can't control that can we?! Still had a lovely time. Full self contained cabin with 2 bedrooms, separate toilet with mini sink and bathroom. Could of used some extra towels for our bigger family. Great mini getaway for us!
Good fishing
